sql.query: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='workflow' THEN singularLabel END),'Workflow') AS workflowSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='workflow' THEN pluralLabel END),'Workflows') AS workflowPlural,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='stage' THEN singularLabel END),'Stage') AS stageSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='stage' THEN pluralLabel END),'Stages') AS stagePlural,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='task' THEN singularLabel END),'Task') AS taskSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='task' THEN pluralLabel END),'Tasks') AS taskPlural,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='location' THEN singularLabel END),'Location') AS locationSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='location' THEN pluralLabel END),'Locations') AS locationPlural,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='space' THEN singularLabel END),'Space') AS spaceSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='space' THEN pluralLabel END),'Spaces') AS spacePlural,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='configuration' THEN singularLabel END),'Configuration') AS configurationSingular,COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN termKey='configuration' THEN pluralLabel END),'Configurations') AS configurationPlural FROM tbl_tenant_terminology WHERE tenantId=:tenantId
